name: @dilukangelo/api-forge-monorepo
description: OAuth + API Gateway + Developer Portal for Any JS/TS Framework
author: Diluk Angelo <dilukangelo@gmail.com>

scripts.build: cd packages/core && bun run build && cd ../.. && bun run --filter '!@api-forge/core' build
scripts.build:publish: bun run clean && bun run build
scripts.publish:all: bun run build:publish && cd packages/core && npm publish --access public && cd ../adapter-express && npm publish --access public && cd ../plugin-openapi && npm publish --access public && cd ../storage-drizzle && npm publish --access public && cd ../storage-prisma && npm publish --access public
